metadata.title: Contact Us | FitMetrics
metadata.description: Get in touch with the FitMetrics team. We're happy to help with calculator questions, feedback, or partnerships.

hero.title: We'd love to hear from you
hero.subtitle: Have a question about our calculators, found a bug, or want to share feedback? Drop us a message and we'll get back to you.

form.title: Send a Message
form.subtitle: Fill in the details below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us how we can help…

form.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out! We'll get back to you soon.
form.note: We typically respond within one business day.
